title: Pather Panchali
tmdbOverview: Impoverished priest Harihar Ray, dreaming of a better life for himself and his family, leaves his rural Bengal village in search of work. Alone, his wife, Sarbojaya, looks after her rebellious daughter, Durga, and her young son, Apu, as well as Harihar's elderly aunt Indir. The children enjoy the small pleasures of their difficult life, while their parents suffer the daily indignities heaped upon them.
synopsis: Pather Panchali is a 1955 drama and history film from India. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.2 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 12 certification (DE rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
